description: Natural 29 bp Tn10 PtetA promoter: a sigma-70 -35/-10 promoter whose spacer holds the central 17 bp of the tetO1 operator, making transcription TetR/anhydrotetracycline-controllable.

references.authors: Bertrand KP, Postle K, Wray LV Jr, Reznikoff WS
references.title: Overlapping divergent promoters control expression of Tn10 tetracycline resistance
The application of Tet repressor in prokaryotic gene regulation and expression

references.authors: Meier I, Wray LV, Hillen W
references.title: Differential regulation of the Tn10-encoded tetracycline resistance genes tetA and tetR by the tandem tet operators O1 and O2
Independent and tight regulation of transcriptional units in Escherichia coli via the LacR/O, the TetR/O and AraC/I1-I2 regulatory elements

label: PtetA
note: Natural 29 bp Tn10 PtetA promoter: a sigma-70 -35/-10 promoter whose spacer holds the central 17 bp of the tetO1 operator, making transcription TetR/anhydrotetracycline-controllable.
5' -35 hexamer of the natural Tn10 PtetA promoter; perfect sigma-70 -35 consensus TTGACA.

label: tetO1
note: Tn10 tet operator (tetO1) occupying the -35/-10 spacer and abutting the -10.
3' -10 (Pribnow) hexamer of the natural Tn10 PtetA promoter; non-consensus CATAAT, matching the sigma-70 -10 consensus TATAAT at 5/6 positions (C instead of ...

functional_claims.label: TetR repression at the tetO1 operator is relieved by tetracycline / anhydrotetracycline (aTc).
